title: Titan
description: A utility mod built to manage Project Eden's resource pack
body:
Titan is a mod built for the Project Eden server designed to enhance a player's experience and streamline the loading of our resource pack Saturn.

### Features
- Auto-updating the server resource pack on game startup/texture reload
- Fix unwanted culling of large custom models
- Notifications in-game when the resource pack has an update
- Telling the server what version of the resource pack you have installed
- Adds a quick connect button on the title screen
- Discord presence integration
- Backpack preview in inventories
- Chat channel visibility in the chat bar

### Compatability
- Supported versions: 1.21.8
- Required: [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- Optional: [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for configuration options
- Incompatible: OptiFine — see our [GitHub](https://github.com/ProjectEdenGG/Titan#incompatibilties) for more info
